primary_catalyst.description: Follow-through day after April 8 Iran-ceasefire gap. NVDA closed at $182.08. Wedbush analyst note: NVIDIA 'undervalued given future AI monetization'. Continued risk-on relief rally; no new discrete catalyst. Low volume (-1.67 vol z) consistent with drift continuation.

force_attributions.rationale: Low-volume follow-through; positioning continuation from Apr 8 ceasefire gap
Continued benefit from ceasefire-driven risk-on tape
